title: crataegus rosiformis subsp. lindmanii
intro: Crataegus rosiformis subsp. lindmanii, also known as the hawthorn, is a deciduous shrub or small tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus rosiformis subsp. lindmanii include reducing high blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of the plant include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and overall well-being.
